allow: Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(export interface AdminProfileRow \\{\\r?\\n  id: string;\\r?\\n  full_name: string \\| null;\)/$1\\n  \\/** Username login \(bisa diganti admin di \\/admin\\/akun\); null = belum diset. *\\/\\n  username?: string \\| null;/' src/lib/db-types.ts)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(  \\/\\*\\* Kontak & sosmed footer[^\\n]*\\n  email: string \\| null;\)/  \\/** Nomor WA utama desa \(wa.me, tanpa "+"\\/spasi\), dipakai seragam di \\/wisata. *\\/\\n  whatsapp: string \\| null;\\n  \\/** PDF guidebook wisata \(upload \\/admin\\/wisata\). *\\/\\n  guidebook_url: string \\| null;\\n$1/' src/lib/db-types.ts)
